title: pisonia umbellifera
intro: Pisonia umbellifera, also known as the birdlime tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pisonia umbellifera include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Pisonia umbellifera can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
